# SPEC-TST-VLD-001: Valid 12-field canonical fixture

мқҙ fixtureлҠ” lint.go FrontmatterSchemaRuleмқҙ мҡ”кө¬н•ҳлҠ” 12к°ң canonical fieldлҘј
лӘЁл‘җ ліҙмң н•ҳм—¬ FrontmatterInvalid findingмқҙ 0кұҙмһ„мқ„ кІҖмҰқн•ңлӢӨ.

## 2. Scope

### 2.1 In Scope

- 12-field canonical frontmatter мӮ¬мҡ© мӢң lint.go FrontmatterSchemaRuleмқҙ finding 0кұҙ нҷ•мқё

### 2.2 Out of Scope

- snake_case alias мјҖмқҙмҠӨлҠ” invalid-snake-case-only fixtureк°Җ лӢҙлӢ№
